Index.title: Welcome to Middle Ocean
Index.subtitle: Your premier B2B partner for digital printing materials, specialized machinery, and premium advertising displays across the MENA region.

Hero.slide2_description: Explore our diverse range of cutting-edge wide-format printers and finishing equipment designed to elevate your production speed and color accuracy.
Hero.slide3_description: Supply your business with our top-tier CMYK glossy sheets, durable foam boards, and professional-grade advertising displays.
Hero.slide3_navDescription: Glossy acrylics, foam boards, and displays
Hero.slide4_description: Our dedicated technical support team ensures your operations remain uninterrupted with efficient regional logistics.
Hero.slide4_navDescription: Expert maintenance and efficient regional supply chain
Hero.slide5_description: Transform any space with our premium range of indoor and outdoor display structures designed for maximum visibility.

Categories.title: Explore Our Products
Categories.subtitle: Discover our comprehensive range of digital printing and advertising solutions.

Features.title: Why Choose Middle Ocean?
Features.subtitle: Discover the advantages of partnering with the MENA region's leading digital printing ecosystem.
Features.content1: High-precision printers and finishing equipment designed for high-volume production and exceptional color accuracy.
Features.content2: From vibrant acrylics to durable foam boards, we supply the materials that make your designs stand out.
Features.content3: State-of-the-art CNC routers for precise cutting and carving of diverse materials from acrylic to wood.
Features.content4: High-speed laser engraving and cutting systems for intricate designs and clean edges on various substrates.

Footer.description: Your premier B2B partner for digital printing materials, specialized machinery, and premium advertising displays across the MENA region.
Footer.newsletterDescription: Get the latest updates, tutorials, and exclusive offers.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Print Professionals
Testimonials.subtitle: Discover how businesses across the Middle East rely on our premium printing materials and machinery.

item1.name: Ahmad Al-Majali
item1.body: The OceanJett adhesive vinyl is incredibly reliable for outdoor billboards.

item2.name: Lana Haddad
item2.body: Exceptional support and top-tier machinery. Best in Jordan.

item3.name: Omar Qudah
item3.body: Fast delivery and superior ink quality. Their printers are second to none.

item4.name: Noor Khasawneh
item4.body: Their acrylic and foam sheets are of the highest grade. Perfect for signage.

item5.name: Zayd Shishani
item5.body: The technical support team in Salt is world-class. Keeps us running 24/7.

item6.name: Salma Toukan
item6.body: Vibrant colors on the new Flora printers. Our clients are amazed.

item7.name: Faisal Al-Fayez
item7.body: Highly durable materials that withstand the harsh desert sun.

item8.name: Rania Nabelsi
item8.body: Smooth workflow integration with their machinery solutions.

item9.name: Hamza Tarawneh
item9.body: The best partner for large-scale advertising projects in the MENA region.

item10.name: Maya Jaber
item10.body: Innovative printing media that changed how we do business.

item11.name: Kareem Sukkar
item11.body: Excellent cost-per-print ratios with their premium ink supplies.

item12.name: Hania Al-Zubi
item12.body: Great range of advertising displays and hardware. Very professional.

item13.name: Sami Hourani
item13.body: Reliable maintenance services. They never let our production stall.

item14.name: Zeina Dajani
item14.body: OceanJett consumables are our go-to for all luxury wall coverings.

item15.name: Tarek Lughod
item15.body: Precision engineered machinery that delivers scale and speed.

item16.name: Layla Farhan
item16.body: Professional-grade materials that exceed international standards.

item18.name: Yasmeen Akroush

item20.name: Farah Mahadeen
item20.body: Trusted partners for over 10 years. Always delivering quality.
